scope: Add only the direct OpenRouter forced-tool transport and fail-closed malformed-tool-call guards required for the Coach-selected S22 proof, while retaining the canonical Baton gate and every proxy, Ollama, and unprofiled route as unsupported.

test_results.command: GOFLAGS=-buildvcs=false go test ./... -count=1 (isolated no-credential, no-model environment)
GOFLAGS=-buildvcs=false go vet ./... (isolated no-credential, no-model environment)
GOFLAGS=-buildvcs=false make build (isolated no-credential, no-model environment)
GOFLAGS=-buildvcs=false go test -cover ./internal/model -count=1 (isolated no-credential, no-model environment; 81.4% statements)

SWORN_DIRECT=1 OPENROUTER_API_KEY=synthetic SWORN_OPENROUTER_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:1 bin/sworn verify --verifier-model openrouter/z-ai/glm-5.2 --spec docs/release/2026-07-15-baton-v0.16-conformance/S22-openrouter-tool-structured-output/spec.json --diff <temporary git diff> --proof docs/release/2026-07-15-baton-v0.16-conformance/S22-openrouter-tool-structured-output/proof.json (isolated no-model-dispatch environment)

reachability.evidence: cmd/sworn/llmcheck_test.go:TestLLMCheckOpenRouterToolStructuredBinaryReachability builds and drives the sworn llm-check binary through direct OpenRouter configuration to a local fake chat-completions endpoint with a synthetic key; it accepts the real forced-tool response through the unchanged canonical gate and exits 0.

delivered.item: AC-01 direct-only route selection preserves the OpenRouter model subpath and keeps proxy OpenRouter, Ollama, and unprofiled clients unsupported.
AC-02 sends exactly one forced emit_structured_output function with the unchanged canonical schema as parameters and no response_format envelope.
AC-03 reaches the direct OpenRouter tool wire from the built sworn llm-check command and accepts a valid canonical ac-satisfaction report.

AC-04 preserves local canonical validation and requested/emitted equality while rejecting malformed, missing, multiple, wrongly named, and semantically invalid tool output without repair or a second request.
AC-05 confines SWORN_OPENROUTER_BASE_URL to validated direct OpenRouter construction and preserves proxy and other-provider endpoint isolation.
AC-07 preserves literal wire JSON null for direct OpenRouter tool arguments and rejects it locally after the sole request without repair or fallback.
AC-08 requires the sole direct OpenRouter tool call to have type function and rejects any other type locally after the sole request without repair or fallback.

not_delivered.item: AC-06 one newly Coach-authorized live direct OpenRouter spec-ambiguity proof receipt
not_delivered.why: Sanitized receipt: check identity spec-ambiguity; model ID openrouter/z-ai/glm-5.2; immutable start commit a09b0e46df465862d00469d4aef2a997442b3d5b; process exit code unavailable; result UNPARSEABLE. The raw temporary file was destroyed. The exactly-one budget is consumed, so S22 is blocked for the Planner with no retry or fallback and S20 remains untouched.

The current sworn binary has no coverage verb and fails with unknown command. Adding that unrelated command is outside this S22 recovery; the artifact-specific AC-to-test matrix and local Go coverage measurement provide the available evidence.
